##RRUFFID=R060373
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=N(CH_3_)_4_Si_4_(SiAl)O_12_
##LOCALITY=Mun-Hambo, north Urals, Hanty- Manskiisky, Autonomous District, Russia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless single crystals with octahedral and cubic forms
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060373
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=N(CH_3_)_4_Si_4.00_(Si_0.97_Al_1.03_)O_12_ ; trace amounts of Na  N and CH_3_ not measured but assumed by stoichiometry
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
